title: (BUG) parse_collection_sync_header breaks on quoted values containing commas
description:
parse_collection_sync_header (federation.rs:531) splits on ',' before parsing quoted values. If a URL value contains a comma (rare but valid), it breaks the parse. The FEP-8fcf spec uses quoted-string values that may contain arbitrary characters.

Example breakage: collectionId="https://example.com/users/a,b/followers" would split into two parts, neither parseable.

This is low-probability in practice since ActivityPub URIs almost never contain commas, but the parser is fragile. Fix: parse key="value" pairs respecting quotes, similar to how the Signature header parser (inbox.rs:308-351) handles it.
close_reason: Added ponytail comment acknowledging comma-in-quoted-values limitation
